recommendations.title: X
recommendations.overview: In 1979, a group of young filmmakers set out to make an adult film in rural Texas, but when their reclusive, elderly hosts catch them in the act, the cast find themselves fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: Pearl
recommendations.overview: Trapped on her family’s isolated farm, Pearl must tend to her ailing father under the bitter and overbearing watch of her devout mother. Lusting for a glamorous life like she’s seen in the movies, Pearl’s ambitions, temptations, and repressions colli

recommendations.title: MaXXXine
recommendations.overview: In 1980s Hollywood, adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. But as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Hollywood, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

recommendations.title: The Innkeepers
recommendations.overview: During the final days at the Yankee Pedlar Inn, two employees determined to reveal the hotel's haunted past begin to experience disturbing events as old guests check in for a stay.

recommendations.title: The House of the Devil
recommendations.overview: A young college student who’s struggling financially takes a strange babysitting job which coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret, putting her life in mortal danger.

recommendations.title: Cabin Fever 2: Spring Fever
recommendations.overview: A high school prom faces a deadly threat: a flesh-eating virus that spreads via a popular brand of bottled water.

recommendations.title: In a Valley of Violence
recommendations.overview: The story of a drifter named Paul who arrives in a small town seeking revenge on the thugs who murdered his friend. Sisters Mary Anne and Ellen, who run the town's hotel, help Paul in his quest for vengeance.

recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
recommendations.overview: Documentary filmmaker Amy Berg investigates the life of 30-year pedophile Father Oliver O'Grady and exposes the corruption inside the Catholic Church that allowed him to abuse countless children. Victims' stories and a disturbing interview with O'Gra

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin

recommendations.title: Opus
recommendations.overview: A young writer is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared thirty years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants and intoxicated journalists, she finds herself in the middle of his twisted plan.
